reviews.comment:
La cajera,super educada. Había un sr que le enseñaba a usar el posnet,de mala manera. Vi robos en la ruta,pero esa YPF, es un robo descarado. No queda otra que parar, hasta ciudad de San Luis,no hay nada.

(Translated by Google)
The cashier was super polite. There was a man who was teaching her how to use the POS terminal, in a rude way. I've seen robberies on the highway, but that YPF station is a blatant robbery. There's no choice but to stop; there's nothing until the city of San Luis.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNbThiZE9REAE
